name: Nerdy and Delusional
description:
Nerdy as she is delusional, welcome the one and only Hanakage "Hana" Kagenou, the self procalaimed "Weaver of Unheard Symphonies".

Yap Session:
First sub bot in a while. I had to write this down even though i was enjoying the beach and now i bring to you Hana, the product of my autistic mind (No this isn't a joke, i actually am autistic).
